questions: What tasks do you do on every project that feel like copy-paste from the last one?
How much time goes into generating or updating documentation, specs, or submittals?
What do junior staff spend most of their time on that doesn't require your expertise?
When you need a code, standard, or spec detail mid-design — how do you find it? How long does that take?
What's your current review process for drawings or specs — who does it, how long, what gets missed?
How do RFIs get generated today, and how much back-and-forth does each one take?
If you could have an expert available 24/7 who had read every code, spec, and past project you've ever touched — what would you ask them?
